description: Phase 15 - Onboarding package: Create packages/onboarding with account onboarding flow, workspace onboarding, role-based onboarding (personal, team admin, creator, advertiser, developer), demo mode, import/connect flows, sample data generation, guided AI setup, privacy setup, and notification preference setup. All as typed interfaces, flow state machines, and utility functions.
steps: 1. Create packages/onboarding/package.json with dependencies on zod, @quant/common. Add typecheck, test, build, lint scripts following the same pattern as other packages.
2. Create packages/onboarding/tsconfig.json extending the root tsconfig pattern used by other packages.

3. Create packages/onboarding/src/types.ts defining interfaces: OnboardingFlow, OnboardingStep, OnboardingRole (personal|team-admin|creator|advertiser|developer), DemoModeConfig, ImportSource, SampleDataSet, AISetupPreferences, PrivacyPreferences, NotificationPreferences.
4. Create packages/onboarding/src/flows/account-onboarding.ts - state machine for account creation: email verification -> password setup -> profile basics -> role selection.
5. Create packages/onboarding/src/flows/workspace-onboarding.ts - state machine for workspace setup: create workspace -> invite members -> configure permissions -> choose apps.
6. Create packages/onboarding/src/flows/role-onboarding.ts - role-specific onboarding paths that customize the experience based on selected role.
7. Create packages/onboarding/src/demo-mode.ts - demo mode configuration and sample data provisioning that lets users explore the platform without committing.
8. Create packages/onboarding/src/import-flows.ts - import/connect flow definitions for email, calendar, contacts, files, repos.
9. Create packages/onboarding/src/ai-setup.ts - guided AI setup: personality selection, memory permissions, context access configuration.
10. Create packages/onboarding/src/privacy-setup.ts - privacy wizard: data sharing preferences, AI data access, visibility settings.
11. Create packages/onboarding/src/notification-setup.ts - notification preference configuration: channels, frequency, categories.
13. Add packages/onboarding to pnpm-workspace.yaml if needed (check if packages/* glob already covers it).
14. Create packages/onboarding/src/__tests__/account-onboarding.test.ts testing the account flow state transitions.
18. Ensure pnpm install --frozen-lockfile still passes (update pnpm-lock.yaml if needed), pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm test passes.
acceptance_criteria: All source files compile without TypeScript errors
Account onboarding flow correctly transitions through steps
Workspace onboarding flow handles member invitations and app selection
Role-based onboarding returns different step sequences for each role
Demo mode generates sample data for each app area
Import flows define connectors for email, calendar, contacts, files, repos
AI setup handles personality and permission configuration
Privacy setup covers data sharing, AI access, and visibility
Notification setup covers channels, frequency, and categories
All tests pass with meaningful assertions on flow transitions
findings: All 73 typecheck tasks pass (72 cached + 1 new). All 76 test tasks pass (75 cached + 1 new). 44 tests in onboarding package. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. No dependencies on @quant/common needed - zod alone was sufficient for all validation.
